rules: Team vehicles and walking only. No bikes, scooters, skateboards, or ride-shares. Shopping carts allowed.
Max team size = number of seatbelts. All members present at start; group stays the same throughout.
All challenge photos must include 2 or more team members.
All photos must be on ONE phone before handoff to judges.
All teams start at the exact same time from the exact same place.
Each team may stealth-photo at most 3 other teams — one photo per target team max.
disqualifications: Use of more than one transport device other than your entered car and your own legs.
Any other infraction at judge's discretion.

challenges.desc: Perform a full cartwheel in front of a bakery.
Get a photo with someone walking a dog over 50 lbs.
Bring back a physical menu from a sit-down restaurant.
Get a stranger to fist bump every member of your team at once.
Take a photo in front of a mural or piece of public street art.
Obtain a business card from a local business.
Convince a stranger to moonwalk for at least 3 full seconds.
Photo with a person in a uniform (any profession).
Record a team member doing a handstand for 3+ seconds in a parking lot.
Photo next to a vehicle older than 1990.
A takeout container from a restaurant you did not eat at.
Get a stranger to high-five a team member while saying "YEET."
Team photo inside (or directly in front of) a fire station.
Perform the worm in a grocery store aisle.
Photo with a sign that has a typo or obvious error on it.
A leaf from a non-commercial tree taller than a house.
